description_long: This is a black Banghó laptop with a rectangular, slim profile and a matte finish. The screen is open and displays a desktop interface with various icons and a wallpaper, indicating the device is powered on. The keyboard is full-sized, featuring a standard QWERTY layout with a function row and a touchpad below. The Banghó logo is prominently displayed both below the screen and on the back of the lid in white, bold letters. There are a few stickers on the palm rest area, likely indicating hardware specifications or certifications. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible ports on the sides in the provided views.
description: A black Banghó laptop with an open screen displaying a desktop, a full keyboard, and visible stickers on the palm rest. The Banghó logo is present on both the lid and below the screen.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open screen with desktop icons, Banghó logo below the display, full keyboard, and stickers on the palm rest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the slim profile and the open screen; no visible ports or features on this side.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the closed back of the lid with the Banghó logo centered in white; no other features visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the open screen and keyboard from an angle; no visible ports or additional features.
attribute_brand_logo: The Banghó logo is visible in two locations: centered below the screen on the bezel and centered on the back of the lid. The logo is in bold, white uppercase letters.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and powered on, displaying a desktop interface with icons and a wallpaper.
attribute_keyboard_layout: The keyboard is a standard QWERTY layout with a function row; no numeric keypad is visible.
attribute_sticker_placement: There are stickers on the palm rest area, to the right of the touchpad, rectangular in shape with some visible text.
